privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Moodle environment task. A new Moodle instance is installed with a Chemistry 101 (CHEM101) course containing a Lab 3: Titration Analysis assignment. Three students (Jane Smith/jsmith grade 85.00, Michael Jones/mjones grade 92.50, Alice Wilson/awilson grade 78.00) are enrolled in the course. The instructor is Professor Anderson (username teacher1, password Teacher1234!). The task requires entering the specified grades and feedback containing the required keywords for each student. The verifier checks grade accuracy (with 0.1 tolerance), presence of feedback keywords, and timestamps to ensure grades were modified during the task session. Passing requires a score of at least 85 out of 100.
